narrative:
Clearcreek-Combined township has 1,287 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.9 percentage points.
